name: Alex Johnson
bio: Met during university orientation in 2021. We still enjoy weekend road trips and gaming nights together.

bio: Former UI design teammate who loves photography, coffee shops, and creative brainstorming sessions.

bio: Travel partner for multiple mountain trips. Always planning the next adventure and fitness challenge.

name: Emma Williams
bio: Known each other since high school. We usually catch up through long voice calls every month.

bio: A startup enthusiast who motivates me to learn modern technologies and improve my coding skills.

bio: Met at a music festival. We exchange playlists and discuss indie albums almost every week.

name: Noah Anderson
bio: Childhood neighbor and football teammate. Haven’t properly caught up since he moved to another city.

bio: Book club friend who enjoys mystery novels and writing short stories during weekend meetups.

bio: Met through an online gaming community and became close friends after years of teamwork and tournaments.

bio: A passionate travel photographer who shares amazing stories and hidden travel destinations.

bio: Hackathon teammate who loves building side projects and discussing startup ideas late at night.

bio: An artist friend who enjoys sketching, digital illustration, and visiting local art exhibitions together.
